coverage.valuesCapturedFromNode: 5006:98 (File Thumbnail instance on Cover page) — best-effort

limitations: search_design_system returns binding METADATA only (name, key, scopes, variableType, variableCollectionName, libraryName) — NOT resolved values. The fileKey l8biHxfarNi1I2RMvVxVOK is a thumbnail/cover file with no Tokens/Variables/Foundations/Color/Styles page; variables and styles live in the linked libraries, not as nodes in this file, so get_variable_defs could only resolve the few bindings present on the single Cover thumbnail instance (node 5006:98) — most of which come from foreign/older libraries, not the two canonical libraries. Therefore name->value resolution for the canonical libraries is NOT available via this file. search results are capped (~14 per query) so single-word palette queries truncate; full 11-shade coverage was obtained by querying each palette by its specific name.
